summary: Iteration 12 - What-If Simulator Feature Testing. Backend APIs 100% PASS (18/18 tests). Frontend What-If Simulator fully verified. The simulator displays between Rebalancing Actions and Financial Goals. Clicking the toggle expands a panel with 4 allocation sliders (Equity/Debt/Gold/Alt), each showing label, percentage, avg return, and volatility. Total allocation indicator shows '100%' in green. Colorful allocation visualization bar displays segments. Projected metrics (Return, Volatility, Sharpe Ratio) and projected portfolio values (5 Years, 10 Years) are present. 'Reset to recommended' button exists. All 8 Invest screen sections render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Simulator uses correct historical avg returns: Equity 12.5%, Debt 7.2%, Gold 9.5%, Alt 10%
Sharpe ratio calculation uses 6% risk-free rate (correct for India)
Total allocation auto-adjusts to maintain 100% when moving sliders
formatINRShort used correctly for projected values

All data-testid attributes present for key simulator elements (simulator-toggle, simulator-panel, sim-slider-*, sim-projected-return, sim-volatility, sim-sharpe, sim-val-5y, sim-val-10y, sim-reset-btn)
context_for_next_testing_agent: What-If Simulator feature fully tested and working. The simulator is a collapsible panel (collapsed by default) between Rebalancing Actions and Financial Goals. Clicking the toggle expands it. Features 4 sliders for Equity/Debt/Gold/Alt with avg return and volatility metadata, total 100% indicator, allocation visualization bar, projected metrics (Return/Volatility/Sharpe), projected values (5y/10y), and Reset button. All 8 Invest sections verified: Markets, Portfolio Overview, My Holdings, Asset Allocation, Risk Profile, Tax Planning, Rebalancing Actions, Financial Goals.

Backend.GET /api/tax-summary: PASS - Returns sections (80C, 80D), fy, tax_saved estimates
Backend.GET /api/portfolio-rebalancing: PASS - Returns profile, strategy_name, actual, target, actions

Frontend.Simulator toggle position: PASS - Between Rebalancing Actions and Financial Goals
Frontend.Slider percentage values: PASS - Shows current % value for each slider
Frontend.Slider avg return metadata: PASS - Shows 'Avg return: X%' for each (12.5, 7.2, 9.5, 10)
Frontend.Other sections intact: PASS - All 8 sections (Markets, Portfolio, Holdings, Allocation, Risk, Tax, Rebalancing, Goals) render correctly
